title: HP Inc. launches Frontier strategic partnership with OpenAI
author: openai-blog
raw_description: HP Inc. scales its OpenAI Frontier partnership to deploy AI across customer experiences, software development, and enterprise operations.
summary: 惠普与OpenAI扩大合作，将AI部署到客户体验、软件开发和运营中，推动企业级AI应用。
analysis_note: 商业合作新闻，技术深度一般，但涉及OpenAI生态扩展，有一定参考价值。
